# CANDIDATE: ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE_VIX_FILTER

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** filter_change  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

Restricting ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE signals to VIX<20 will improve edge by excluding losing trades in VIX≥20 regimes, based on observation that VIX≥20 yields WR=34% and P&L=-$620 while VIX<20 drives the majority of profit in Q2-2026.

## Mechanism

Existing ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE gate triggers on ORB_RETEST_LONG signals with confidence=medium, OR range < 2.00, and long-only direction. Added VIX<20 condition using real-time VIX at entry time. Exit logic unchanged: chart stop at ORH (SPY close < ORH - $0.05) with premium stop = -0.99, TP1 = ORH + 50% × or_range, runner to ORH + 100% × or_range.

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | taken (ORB signal present and NARROW) | taken (same, as VIX<20 expected) | 0 |
| 5/01 winner | taken | taken | 0 |
| 5/04 winner | taken | taken | 0 |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** Deduped watcher-observations.jsonl for ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE (N=32 unique bars) from 16-month period; selection bias possible due to watcher logging only when conditions met; overfit risk medium when applying regime filter based on historical performance.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no OOS test performed for VIX-filtered gate)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (no real-fills validation on top 3 J days for VIX-filtered gate)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: missing profitable VIX≥20 signals (though historical shows VIX≥20 unprofitable); max drawdown: potential increase if over-filtering misses recovery trades; blow-up scenario: VIX<20 signals becoming correlated with large losses (unlikely given historical).
6. **Concentration:** Top-5 days concentration unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (base gate shows Q2-2026 concentration=16% deduped)

## Pre-merge gate

gym validators, walk-forward (OOS/IS ratio ≥0.5), real-fills validation on top 3 J days

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- based on leaderboard's VIX gate finding showing VIX≥20 WR=34% P&L=-$620 and VIX<20 driving edge in Q2-2026

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE by adding regime filter; no conflict with other candidates as refinement of existing gate.
